zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, Unite: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny於1126年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，他的父親Dyfnwal ap Caradawg40歲，母親Joyce De Balladon27歲。他於1136年之前與Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年12月25日在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny于1126年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼时，他的父亲Dyfnwal ap Caradawg40岁，母亲Joyce De Balladon27岁。他于1136年之前与Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1177年12月25日在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny was born in 1126, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Dyfnwal ap Caradawg, was 40 and his mother, Joyce De Balladon, was 27. He married Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire before 1136, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 December 1177, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny est né en 1126, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Dyfnwal ap Caradawg, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joyce De Balladon, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire avant 1136, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1177, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny 1126 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dyfnwal ap Caradawg 40 und seine Mutter Joyce De Balladon 27. Er hat vor 1136 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1177 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny è nato il nel 1126 nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Dyfnwal ap Caradawg, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joyce De Balladon, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire prima del 1136, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 dicembre 1177, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavennyが1126年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父Dyfnwal ap Caradawgは40歳，母Joyce De Balladonは27歳であった。1136年以前にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーでDyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年12月25日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny(이)가 1126년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dyfnwal ap Caradawg(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joyce De Balladon(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1136년 이전 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 12월 25일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny nasceu em 1126, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Dyfnwal ap Caradawg, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joyce De Balladon, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire antes 1136, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny родился в 1126 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Dyfnwal ap Caradawg было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joyce De Balladon, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire перед 1136 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 декабря 1177 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Seisyll ap Dyfnwal of Abergavenny nació en 1126, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Dyfnwal ap Caradawg, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joyce De Balladon, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Dyddgu verch Owain of Monmouthshire antes de 1136, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1177, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
